title: Product Vision Packet
description: Initial raw concept and brainstorming consensus locked after Discovery or Reverse Engineering.

project_name.description: The working title of the project.

core_concept.description: A high-level elevator pitch explaining what the product does.

problem_statement.description: The exact problem this product solves for the target audience.

target_audience.description: Who this product is being built for.

user_pain_points.description: Specific pain points the audience currently faces.

success_metrics.description: KPIs or measurable outcomes that define success.

origin.description: Whether this vision was born from a prompt or scanned from local code.

key_differentiators.description: What makes this product unique compared to generic solutions.

key_assumptions.description: Market or technical assumptions being made early on.

scope_boundaries.description: Explicit out-of-scope declarations to prevent scope creep.
